prompt: Add TurboSign digital signature functionality to my Spring Boot app. I need REST endpoints for sending documents for signing and checking signature status.

assertions.name: config-file-created
assertions.description: A TurboSign config/client file was created (e.g. TurboDocxConfig.java or TurboSignService.java)

assertions.name: config-has-turbosign
assertions.description: Config file creates TurboSign client using Builder pattern with API key and sender email

assertions.name: controller-created
assertions.description: A Spring @RestController was created for signature endpoints

assertions.name: env-has-sign-vars
assertions.description: application.properties or .env contains turbodocx.api-key and turbodocx.sender-email (or TURBODOCX_ env vars)

assertions.name: no-partner-vars
assertions.description: Config does NOT contain partner API key variables (user only asked for TurboSign)

assertions.name: follows-java-conventions
assertions.description: Files placed in proper Java package directory structure (src/main/java/...)
